seo.title: Release Governance: Storybook Smoke Check for Design System Changes
seo.description: Operational rule and checklist for running Storybook builds and validation scripts before releasing changes to the design system, preventing visual and API drift between Storybook and production.
seo.og.title: Storybook Smoke Check for Design System Releases
seo.og.description: Pre-release governance to block design system drift by enforcing Storybook builds and validation scripts before deployment.
challenge: Define a clear, enforceable pre-release governance rule to prevent design system and Storybook drift from reaching production.
insight: Adding a mandatory Storybook build plus token and content validation before releases that touch the design system catches token drift, font issues, CSS module desync, and component API breakage early.
actionItem: Integrate `pnpm storybook:build` and the validation scripts into the pre-release checklist and plan CI automation to run them on relevant changes.
